commands: sudo -u ubuntu pm2 stop mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge 2>/dev/null || true
sudo -u ubuntu pm2 delete mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge 2>/dev/null || true
sudo -u ubuntu bash -lc 'cd /opt/MBUTOMS/whatsapp-bridge && timeout 300 npm run list-groups'
sudo -u ubuntu bash -lc 'cd /opt/MBUTOMS/whatsapp-bridge && pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs && pm2 save'
